overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character travels from a covered sidewalk under an urban overpass, past a neon-lit food stall, down to a waterfront promenade, and enters a bar to interact with NPCs. The environment features futuristic concrete architecture with prominent pink and cyan neon lighting against a darkening blue sky.

events.description: character begins walking forward along the sidewalk from initial position
futuristic sedan drives past on the adjacent road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past palm trees and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete transit overpass with thick support columns spanning across the street
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
large brutalist concrete building with multiple floors and rectangular windows
glowing purple and pink neon signs of shops under the overpass
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles driving past

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk sheltered beneath a massive transit overpass in a futuristic city. Palm trees line the left side while glowing purple neon signs illuminate shop fronts on the right. Futuristic cars drive past on the adjacent road as the character moves forward through sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with circular food kiosk under overpass

events.description: approaching the circular neon-lit food stall with bright pink illumination
character navigates around the right side of the circular food stall

agents.ego_description: walking past the glowing pink circular food stall and continuing toward the waterfront area

entered.detail: circular food kiosk with bright pink neon trim and 'FRESH & INSTANT CORNER' signage
tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'CYBERARM' advertisement with hand imagery

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles around a brightly lit pink neon food stall situated under the concrete overpass. A large vertical digital billboard advertising 'CYBERARM' becomes visible as the character moves past the stall toward an opening leading to the waterfront. The road traffic is left behind as the scene becomes more pedestrian-focused.

events.description: descending concrete ramp from overpass level down to waterfront promenade
approaching and entering the Fresh Food establishment from the waterfront

agents.ego_description: running down the concrete ramp to the waterfront promenade, then walking through outdoor seating areas toward a restaurant entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor cafe table under white umbrella

entered.detail: wide open plaza area with tiled pavement overlooking the water
calm ocean water visible beyond the promenade railing
white canopy umbrellas over outdoor dining tables with neon-lit chairs
distinctive circular multi-story building with yellow lighting on the waterfront
glass door entrance with 'FRESH FOOD' neon signage above

segments.scene_description: The character descends a ramp to an open waterfront promenade with views of the ocean and a distinctive circular building in the distance. The area features outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas and neon-lit furniture. The character walks through this moderate crowd toward a building entrance labeled 'FRESH FOOD' and enters the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro-futuristic bar interior with cyan and pink neon lighting

events.description: entering the Fresh Food bar from the waterfront promenade
approaching two NPCs and initiating dialogue interaction with dialogue options appearing

agents.ego_description: entering the neon-lit bar and approaching two women at a table to initiate conversation, stopping in front of them

notable_agents.action: woman with blonde hair sitting on table edge wearing white jacket and pink pants
woman with green hair standing and talking, wearing black and yellow jacket

entered.detail: long bar counter with bright cyan neon underlighting and multiple stools
large red and blue neon sign reading 'SIRIUS GOLD' on the back wall
blue and white checkered pattern floor tiles in the dining area
multiple screens mounted above the bar displaying various images
metal bar stools with teal seats arranged along the counter

segments.scene_description: Inside the Fresh Food bar, the environment is illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights with a checkered floor pattern. The character approaches two women—one seated on a table edge and another standing with green hair—near the bar counter. A large 'SIRIUS GOLD' neon sign glows on the back wall as the character initiates dialogue with the NPCs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass through a vibrant waterfront promenade and into a neon-lit interior. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive transit overpass, flanked by palm trees and purple neon shop fronts as futuristic cars stream past. As the character circles a brightly lit pink food stall and passes a towering digital billboard, the scene shifts away from the road traffic toward an opening that leads to the coast. The camera then descends a ramp to an open waterfront promenade filled with white umbrellas and neon furniture, moving through a crowd toward the entrance of a building labeled Fresh Food. Finally, the environment transitions indoors to a bar with a checkered floor and cyan lighting, where the character approaches two women beneath a glowing Sirius Gold sign to initiate dialogue.
